Headline: Computer Engineer, Minor Embedded systems (current), Software Engineer at PLNTS.com 🌱
Summary: # About Me  I am computer engineer interested in broadening my perspective on global low-level concepts regarding networking, microcontrollers, and chip design.   I am currently thriving in my role as a Software Engineer at PLNTS.com, where the vibrant world of E-commerce and Web Development captivates me daily. My role extends beyond mere coding; it's about being an essential part of a collaborative team that learns and grows together.  In my journey through the field of Computer Science, I've laid a solid foundation not just in software engineering but also in the realms of machine learning and AI. These areas, with their potential to revolutionize automation, fascinate me deeply.  My enthusiasm for technology doesn't stop at development. I'm passionate about refining my tools and workflow to optimize productivity. Embracing Neovim, various Linux distributions, tmux, and various other toolchains have been a game-changer for me, enhancing both my efficiency and creativity. Moreover, the Glove80 keyboard has become an integral part of my quest for ergonomic and efficient computing.  Beyond my current expertise, I have a keen interest in understanding computers at a more fundamental level. This curiosity has led me to pursue a minor in Embedded Systems, aiming to deepen my knowledge of how software intimately interacts with hardware. This endeavor is not just about adding another skill set but about satisfying my deep-rooted fascination with the nuts and bolts of technology.  I enjoy reading science fiction like *Dune* and *The Three-Body Problem*, playing board games, studying computer science, and singing.
